rules.description: Click inside the interactive plot to move the new point. Classification updates automatically.
Use Manhattan distance, vary k, and toggle the outlier to see how the prediction changes.
Adjust scale a, slope b, and shift x0 in a/(1+e^{-b(x-x0)}) to see how the sigmoid changes.

rules.section_title: Interactive Notebook: Logistic Models and NLL Landscape
rules.description: Adapted from the Sandbox code. Tune the logistic model parameters and dataset settings, then compare the current model against the minimum-NLL solution.
rules.iframe_title: Interactive Logistic Regression and NLL Landscape Notebook

rules.section_title: Interactive Notebook: Sign Function for Classification
rules.description: Explore the sign-based binary classifier with adjustable class centers, spread, and decision boundary.
Adjust the weight vector and bias to see how the hyperplane and its normal vector change in two dimensions.
